info.name: Nyaya API
info.description:
OpenAPI specification for the Nyaya quiz and gamification platform.
Covers authentication, quiz play, progress tracking, leaderboards,
and admin content management.

item.name: Bulk Smoke Run
item.description: Requests reordered into a dependency-safe smoke test flow for local bulk runs.
